stories.title: The Lost Treasure of Captain Byte
stories.description: You've discovered Captain Byte's ancient map — a legendary pirate who hid a digital treasure across uncharted islands. Navigate jungles, decode ciphers, and survive traps to claim the treasure before it's lost forever.

chapters.title: The Window
chapters.narrative: You need to see outside to find the stars.
chapters.challenge: Take a picture of a window.

chapters.title: The Captain's Age
chapters.narrative: The captain was 20 years old 10 years ago. How old is he now?
chapters.challenge: Find the captain's age.

chapters.title: The Light Source
chapters.narrative: The cave is dark. Show me a source of light.
chapters.challenge: Take a picture of a lamp or flashlight.

chapters.title: The Hidden Message
chapters.narrative: A message in a bottle reads: 'H E L L O' but shifted by 1 letter forward.
chapters.challenge: Decode the message.

chapters.title: The Final Chest
chapters.narrative: A chest requires a 3 digit code. 682: one digit is right and in place. 614: one digit is right but in wrong place. 206: two digits right but wrong place. 738: nothing is correct. 780: one digit right but wrong place.
chapters.challenge: What is the code?

chapters.title: The Rations
chapters.narrative: You need energy. Show me some rations.
chapters.challenge: Take a picture of a snack or fruit.

chapters.title: The Navigation Device
chapters.narrative: You need to find your way. Show me a navigation device.
chapters.challenge: Take a picture of a watch or compass.

chapters.title: The Artifact
chapters.narrative: You found an ancient artifact! Show me something old.
chapters.challenge: Take a picture of a book or coin.

chapters.title: The River Crossing
chapters.narrative: A boat holds 2 people. You have 3 people. How many trips across the river are needed?
chapters.challenge: How many trips?

chapters.title: The Explorer's Tool
chapters.narrative: An explorer needs to record their journey. Show me a writing tool.
chapters.challenge: Take a picture of a pen or pencil.

chapters.title: The Shield
chapters.narrative: You need protection. Show me something that covers you.
chapters.challenge: Take a picture of a jacket or hat.

chapters.title: The Jungle Path
chapters.narrative: The jungle requires proof of life. Capture a green guardian.
chapters.challenge: Take a picture of a plant or leaf.

chapters.title: The Ancient Lock
chapters.narrative: A stone door has numbers carved: 2, 4, 8, 16, ? What is the next number?
chapters.challenge: Find the next number.

chapters.title: The Thirst Trap
chapters.narrative: You must stay hydrated on this adventure. Show me your water source.
chapters.challenge: Take a picture of a cup or bottle.

chapters.title: The Pirate's Password
chapters.narrative: A skeletal parrot squawks: 'The password is the reverse of 'ocean'.'
chapters.challenge: What is the password?

chapters.title: The Key
chapters.narrative: You need a physical key to unlock a chest.
chapters.challenge: Take a picture of a key.

chapters.title: The Golden Coins
chapters.narrative: You have 10 coins, 1 is fake and lighter. You have a balance scale. How many weighings to find the fake?
chapters.challenge: How many weighings?

chapters.title: The Cave Riddle
chapters.narrative: I have keys but no locks. I have space but no room. You can enter but not go outside. What am I?
chapters.challenge: Solve the riddle.

chapters.title: The Map Fragment
chapters.narrative: You find a torn piece of parchment. A riddle reads: 'I speak without a mouth and hear without ears. What am I?'
chapters.challenge: Solve the riddle.

chapters.title: The Compass Rose
chapters.narrative: The map says: 'Walk 10 paces North, then 10 East, then 10 South.' What direction are you from the start?
chapters.challenge: What direction are you?

stories.title: The Enchanted Algorithm
stories.description: The Great Source Code of the realm has been shattered by the Dark Compiler. You must travel through enchanted forests and haunted servers to collect the broken fragments and restore magic to the kingdom.

chapters.title: The Enchanted Mirror
chapters.narrative: A mirror shows '101' backwards. What is the number?
chapters.challenge: Read the mirror.

chapters.title: The Spell Scroll
chapters.narrative: You need a scroll to read the ancient text.
chapters.challenge: Take a picture of a book or rolled paper.

chapters.title: The Wizard's Age
chapters.narrative: The wizard is twice as old as his apprentice. The apprentice is 50. How old is the wizard?
chapters.challenge: Find the wizard's age.

chapters.title: The Spell Book
chapters.narrative: A spell requires reversing the word 'MAGIC'.
chapters.challenge: Reverse the word.

chapters.title: The Magic Square
chapters.narrative: A 3x3 magic square sums to 15. What goes in the center?
chapters.challenge: Find the center number.

chapters.title: The Elven Sequence
chapters.narrative: Elves count: 1, 1, 2, 3, 5, 8, ? What is next?
chapters.challenge: Find the next number.

chapters.title: The Familiar
chapters.narrative: Summon an animal familiar.
chapters.challenge: Take a picture of a pet or stuffed animal.

chapters.title: The Goblin's Riddle
chapters.narrative: I have cities, but no houses. I have mountains, but no trees. I have water, but no fish. What am I?
chapters.challenge: Solve the riddle.

chapters.title: The Enchanted Ring
chapters.narrative: A ring of power is required.
chapters.challenge: Take a picture of a ring or circular object.
chapters.hint: A jewelry ring, key ring, or coin.

chapters.title: The Portal
chapters.narrative: Open a portal to the next realm.
chapters.challenge: Take a picture of a door or window.

chapters.title: The Potion Mix
chapters.narrative: Mix 2 parts red, 3 parts blue. How many parts total?
chapters.challenge: Find the sum.

chapters.title: The Magical Flame
chapters.narrative: You need fire to forge the sword.
chapters.challenge: Take a picture of a light source.

chapters.title: The Crystal Ball
chapters.narrative: Peer into the future. Show me a crystal ball.
chapters.challenge: Take a picture of something spherical.

chapters.title: The Guardian's Shield
chapters.narrative: Defend against the dragon's fire.
chapters.challenge: Take a picture of a plate or flat object.

chapters.title: The Healing Herb
chapters.narrative: Find a healing herb to cure the curse.
chapters.challenge: Take a picture of a plant.

chapters.title: The Magic Wand
chapters.narrative: You need a wand to cast the spell.
chapters.challenge: Take a picture of a pen, pencil, or stick.

chapters.title: The Potion Flask
chapters.narrative: You need a container for your potion.
chapters.challenge: Take a picture of a cup or bottle.

chapters.title: The Troll Bridge
chapters.narrative: A troll demands a toll: 'What has a head and a tail but no body?'
chapters.challenge: Solve the riddle.

chapters.title: The King's Crown
chapters.narrative: The king's crown is pure gold. It weighs 10kg. The density is 19.3. What is the volume?
chapters.challenge: Calculate volume.

chapters.title: The Dragon's Math
chapters.narrative: If 3 dragons lay 3 eggs in 3 days, how many dragons lay 100 eggs in 100 days?
chapters.challenge: Solve the math.

stories.title: Mission: Deep Space Rescue
stories.description: A distress signal has been received from the outer colonies. As the lead engineer of the USS Voyager, you must navigate asteroid fields, repair broken AI systems, and rescue the stranded colonists.

chapters.title: The Time Dilation
chapters.narrative: Time runs twice as slow. 1 hour for you is how many for them?
chapters.challenge: Calculate time.

chapters.title: The Spacesuit
chapters.narrative: Prepare for EVA. Show me protective gear.
chapters.challenge: Take a picture of gloves or a jacket.

chapters.title: The Viewing Port
chapters.narrative: Look out into space.
chapters.challenge: Take a picture of a window.

chapters.title: The Tricorder
chapters.narrative: Scan the environment. Show a scanning device.
chapters.challenge: Take a picture of a phone or remote.

chapters.title: The Warp Drive
chapters.narrative: To engage warp, calculate the square root of 144.
chapters.challenge: Calculate the root.

chapters.title: The Specimen
chapters.narrative: Collect a biological specimen.
chapters.challenge: Take a picture of a plant or food.

chapters.title: The Hologram
chapters.narrative: A hologram shows a cube. How many edges does a cube have?
chapters.challenge: Count the edges.

chapters.title: The Password Override
chapters.narrative: The password is the 4th planet from the sun.
chapters.challenge: Name the planet.

chapters.title: The Core Crystal
chapters.narrative: Find a power source for the ship.
chapters.challenge: Take a picture of a battery or charger.

chapters.title: The Airlock
chapters.narrative: The airlock code is prime numbers under 10. What are they?
chapters.challenge: List the primes.
chapters.hint: Numbers only divisible by 1 and themselves.

chapters.title: The Navigation Star
chapters.narrative: Find a celestial body.
chapters.challenge: Take a picture of a light bulb.
chapters.hint: A light source representing a star.

chapters.title: The AI Core
chapters.narrative: The AI says: 'Translate binary 1010 to decimal.'
chapters.challenge: Convert binary to decimal.

chapters.title: The Navigation Error
chapters.narrative: You are at coordinates (0,0). Move +5 X, -3 Y, +2 X. What is your X coordinate?
chapters.challenge: Find the X coordinate.

chapters.title: The Rations Replicator
chapters.narrative: Replicate some food.
chapters.challenge: Take a picture of a packaged snack.

chapters.title: The Gravity Plating
chapters.narrative: Gravity is 9.8 m/s^2. An object falls for 2 seconds. Velocity?
chapters.challenge: Calculate velocity.

chapters.title: The Power Grid
chapters.narrative: Grid capacity is 100%. Engine takes 40%, Life Support 30%. How much is left?
chapters.challenge: Calculate remaining power.

chapters.title: The Alien Message
chapters.narrative: Aliens send: 'Zpv bsf opu bmpof'. Shift back by 1.
chapters.challenge: Decode the message.

chapters.title: The Hull Repair
chapters.narrative: Find a tool to fix the breach.
chapters.challenge: Take a picture of a tool or tape.

chapters.title: The Data Disk
chapters.narrative: Recover the ship's logs.
chapters.challenge: Take a picture of a flash drive, CD, or book.
chapters.hint: Storage media or a physical book.

chapters.title: The Comm Link
chapters.narrative: Establish communications.
chapters.challenge: Take a picture of headphones or a speaker.

stories.title: The Shadow Protocol
stories.description: An international hacking syndicate known as 'The Null Pointers' has stolen classified global data. Your mission as an elite cyber-spy is to infiltrate their network, crack their security, and recover the files without being detected.

chapters.title: The Distraction
chapters.narrative: Create a diversion.
chapters.challenge: Take a picture of a coin or small object.
chapters.hint: A coin, keys, or noisy object.

chapters.title: The Laser Grid
chapters.narrative: Grid is 5x5. You start at 1,1. Move to 5,5. How many steps minimum? (diagonal allowed)
chapters.challenge: Count the steps.

chapters.title: The Gadget
chapters.narrative: Show me your spy gadget.
chapters.challenge: Take a picture of a phone or watch.

chapters.title: The Wiretap
chapters.narrative: Listen to their conversation.
chapters.challenge: Take a picture of headphones or a mic.

chapters.title: The Weapon
chapters.narrative: Self-defense is necessary.
chapters.challenge: Take a picture of a pen (mightier than the sword).

chapters.title: The Identity
chapters.narrative: Your alias is 'Mr. Smith'. The reverse is?
chapters.challenge: Reverse the string.

chapters.title: The Dead Drop
chapters.narrative: The dead drop is under the bench with 4 legs. If there are 10 benches, how many legs total?
chapters.challenge: Calculate total legs.

chapters.title: The Escape Vehicle
chapters.narrative: We need a ride.
chapters.challenge: Take a picture of keys or a car/bike.

chapters.title: The Disguise
chapters.narrative: You need to blend in. Show me a disguise.
chapters.challenge: Take a picture of sunglasses or a hat.

chapters.title: The Intel
chapters.narrative: Capture the enemy intel.
chapters.challenge: Take a picture of a document or screen.
chapters.hint: Paper with writing or a monitor.

chapters.title: The Surveillance
chapters.narrative: Camera 1 rotates 360 degrees in 60s. Degrees per second?
chapters.challenge: Calculate rate.

chapters.title: The Encrypted File
chapters.narrative: Decrypt: 'ZzZ' to 'AaA'. Shift +1.
chapters.challenge: What is shift +1 of 'C'?

chapters.title: The Drop Point
chapters.narrative: The contact says: 'Meet at the 5th prime number street.'
chapters.challenge: Find the prime number.

chapters.title: The Fingerprint
chapters.narrative: A fingerprint has 3 loops and 2 whorls. How many total patterns?
chapters.challenge: Add them up.

chapters.title: The Wire Cut
chapters.narrative: Cut the wire that is not red, blue, or green. The options are red, blue, green, yellow.
chapters.challenge: Which wire?

chapters.title: The Safe Combo
chapters.narrative: The combination is the first 3 digits of Pi.
chapters.challenge: What is the combo?

chapters.title: The Safe
chapters.narrative: Find where they keep the secrets.
chapters.challenge: Take a picture of a box or drawer.
chapters.hint: A cardboard box or desk drawer.

chapters.title: The Hiding Spot
chapters.narrative: Conceal yourself.
chapters.challenge: Take a picture of a closet or under a table.

chapters.title: The Keycard
chapters.narrative: Access the secure facility.
chapters.challenge: Take a picture of a card (ID, credit card).

chapters.title: The Escape Route
chapters.narrative: You run 10km/h. The extraction is 5km away. How many minutes?
chapters.challenge: Calculate time.
